mapper.select:
SELECT id, ecdu_drawer_no, ecdu_unit_name, ecdu_rated_current, ecdu_rated_voltage, ecdu_switch_model, ecdu_switch_manufacturer, ecdu_setting_current, ecdu_corresponding_load, ecdu_install_location, ecdu_unit_status, ecdu_factory, ecdu_reserve_1, ecdu_reserve_2, ecdu_reserve_3 FROM electric_cabinet_drawer_unit
AND ecdu_unit_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.ecduUnitName}, '%')
AND ecdu_switch_model LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.ecduSwitchModel}, '%')
AND ecdu_unit_status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.ecduUnitStatus}, '%')
AND ecdu_factory LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.ecduFactory}, '%')

SELECT id, ecdu_drawer_no, ecdu_unit_name, ecdu_rated_current, ecdu_rated_voltage, ecdu_switch_model, ecdu_switch_manufacturer, ecdu_setting_current, ecdu_corresponding_load, ecdu_install_location, ecdu_unit_status, ecdu_factory, ecdu_reserve_1, ecdu_reserve_2, ecdu_reserve_3 FROM electric_cabinet_drawer_unit
AND ecdu_unit_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ecduUnitName}, '%')
AND ecdu_switch_model LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ecduSwitchModel}, '%')
AND ecdu_unit_status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ecduUnitStatus}, '%')
AND ecdu_factory LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ecduFactory}, '%')
